summary: Plan-mode classification only. The live representative #72572 is open and remains the canonical issue for this symlinked ~/.openclaw behavior, but the preflight marks #72572 and the overlapping open PRs #72650 and #72713 as security-sensitive because they change the exec-approvals trust boundary. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix PR action is planned.
